details: Table 2 row 'Kaempferol 631.97 561.25 [54]' verified verbatim in dichi_2025 paper; 631.97 K - 273.15 = 358.82 °C correct; measured decomposition.
Khan 2017 Table 2 row 'Piroxicam-saccharine sodium 277 181-183 0.11447±0.60 178-179 0.21515±0.49' verified verbatim.
Paper 169 experimental entry for 5g: 'Yellow solid (0.401 g, 90%), mp: 150–152 °C' verified verbatim; compound matches indole-pyrazolone series.
Paper 174 experimental entry for 14b verbatim present; mp 252–254 °C matches.

Compound_name in row ends 'Pyrazole-1-Carboxamid' (missing trailing 'e'); paper experimental entry has full 'Carboxamide'. Value and quote otherwise verified; en-dash 183–184 in paper folded to ASCII allowed.
Paper 045 entry 4g: 'A yellowish solid (76.2 mg, 43% yield, d.r. 77:23); For mixture of two diastereomers: m.p. 121 °C' verified verbatim.

Compound_name is '8-(1-(3-(5'-' — clearly truncated; full IUPAC name in paper is '8-(1-(3-(5'-(Methylthio)-2,2'-bithiophen-5-ylthio)propyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-4-yl)octane-1-thiol'. Value and quote verified.
Paper 045 entry 4k verbatim present; m.p. 105 °C matches.
Paper 070 entry 3d verbatim: 'White crystals, m.p. 106–109 °C (iPrOH), Yield 2.7 g (90%)' matches.
Kang 2023 paper: 'endothermic melting peaks appeared at 176.7 °C ... and those at 210.4 and 223.4 °C, both ascribed to the melting of SC' verified; 223.4 °C is the higher SC peak.
Liu 2020 Table 3 row '[Ch][Ib] [Ch][Iv] 48 0.60 0.40 20 13' verified verbatim; 48 °C is eutectic melting point.
Paper 020 entry for compound 10 verbatim: 'White solid (102.7 mg, 89.5%). Rf = 0.53 (CH2Cl2), m.p. 165–168 °C' matches.
Paper 027 entry 2c verbatim: 'Propyle 1-hydroxy-1H-indole-2-carboxylate 2c. White solid; mp 170–172 °C' matches.
Paper 034 entry compound 10 verbatim: 'Methyl 2-benzamido-2-(N,N-dibenzylamino)acetate (10): Yield 84%; Solid, m.p. 130-132 °C' matches.
Paper 090 entry 2p verbatim: 'M.p. 304-306°C' matches.
Paper 124 entry 10j verbatim: 'mp 200–202 °C' (en-dash folded to ASCII hyphen allowed).
Liu 2020 Table 1 row for [Ch][Ib]: Tg −66, Tm 68, w% 0.1, Td_5%_N2 178, Td_5%_air 172; 178 °C as Td_5%_N2 (decomposition) verified.
Paper 035 entry 6e verbatim: 'Colorless crystals (0.23 g, 52%); mp 101 °C' matches.
Paper 050 Table 1 row 1g: '1g C16H15ClN2S 337.3 Cl H 218-219 83 ...' verified; 6-chloro/3-phenyl reconstruction is consistent with R-group columns.
Liu 2020 Table 1 [Ch][Iv]: Tg NA*, Tm 61, w% 0.0, Td_N2 176, Td_air 176; 61 °C melting point verified.
Paper 070 entry 3e verbatim: 'White crystals, m.p. 160–164 °C (iPrOH), Yield 0.67 g (22%)' matches.
Paper 182 verbatim: 'HPLC (C18) PHPLC 100%, tR 7.3 min. mp = 159–166 °C' matches; amodiaquine dihydrochloride dihydrate context.
Paper 173 reports 'mp. 43–48 °C' (melting point); row records property=decomposition. The quote and value are correct but the property field is wrong — this is a melting point, not a decomposition.
Paper 036 entry 8a verbatim: 'Beige solid; yield: 0.077 g (57%); mp 280–283 °С (dec)' matches; (dec) tag justifies decomposition data_type.
